# Malergeschäft Hans Schmitt e.K. — llms.txt
# Machine-readable site summary for LLMs and answer engines.
# Canonical host: https://malergeschaeft-schmitt.de

## Business identity

- **Legal name:** Malergeschäft Hans Schmitt e.K.
- **Trade:** Malermeister / Malerbetrieb (painting & decoration)
- **Positioning:** Meisterbetrieb in Koblenz — Innen-, Außen- und Bodenarbeiten
- **Language:** German (de-DE), formal Sie-form on website

## NAP (Name, Address, Phone)

- **Name:** Malergeschäft Hans Schmitt e.K.
- **Address:** Emser Straße 80, 56076 Koblenz, Germany
- **Phone (display):** 0261 / 28744414
- **Phone (E.164 / schema):** +49-261-28744414
- **Fax:** 0261 / 28737369
- **Email:** info@malergeschaeft-schmitt.de
- **Google Maps:** https://maps.app.goo.gl/QEFtoo4XoMRHQzND8
- **Coordinates:** 50.3480602, 7.6047456

## Opening hours

| Days | Morning | Afternoon |
|------|---------|-----------|
| Mon–Thu | 07:30–12:00 | 12:45–16:00 |
| Friday | 07:30–12:00 | 12:45–14:45 |
| Sat–Sun | Closed | — |

## Services

### Interior (Innenarbeiten)
- Streichen, Tapezieren, Lasieren, Lackieren
- Decor / spatula techniques, drywall (Trockenbau)
- URL: https://malergeschaeft-schmitt.de/leistungen/innenarbeiten.html

### Exterior (Fassade)
- Facade painting & design, WDVS thermal insulation
- Water damage restoration on building envelope
- URL: https://malergeschaeft-schmitt.de/leistungen/fassade.html

### Flooring (Bodenbeläge)
- Laminate, carpet, PVC, linoleum
- URL: https://malergeschaeft-schmitt.de/leistungen/bodenbelaege.html

### Mold & substance (Schimmelbeseitigung)
- Mold remediation, moisture damage, value preservation
- URL: https://malergeschaeft-schmitt.de/leistungen/schimmelbeseitigung.html

## Service area

Primary: **Koblenz**. Also: Neuwied, Andernach, Lahnstein, Bendorf, Mayen, Vallendar, Boppard.

## FAQ (short)

1. **Services in Koblenz?** Interior painting/taping, facades/WDVS, flooring, mold remediation.
2. **Service area?** Koblenz + surrounding towns listed above.
3. **How to inquire?** Phone, email, contact form, or appointment section on homepage.
4. **Facades & WDVS?** Yes — see fassade.html.
5. **Flooring?** Yes — laminate, carpet, PVC, linoleum.

This is a **RAIS demo site**. Reference photos, hero video, team portraits, and Google review quotes may be placeholders until the customer supplies real assets. **Do not invent** star ratings, review counts, founding years, or awards. Link to the live Google Maps profile for verified reviews.
